search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: How to download & put iTunes music/movies on Galaxy S5? \"How to download & put i Tunes music/movies on Galaxy S5? How can I put i Tunes on Galaxy S5? I've had an iPod Touch for about a year and a half and I just got a Galaxy S5 phone. I don't recall Samsung/Android phones being able to connect with i Tunes, which is my only source of downloaded music.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses transferring iTunes content to an Android device, not about starting a YouTube channel.
